'''Engineer droids''' were [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s specially programmed to perform as battlefield [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and saboteurs for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BFII" />

==Overview==
[[File:Engineer_Droid.png|thumb|left|150px|An engineer droid]]
Engineer droids were distinguished by the [[Color/Legends|orange]] markings on their torso and shoulders.<ref name="BFII" /> Their advanced programming allowed for the operation of virtually every vehicle-allied or otherwise in existence.<ref name="PRIMA" /> They were also effective at repairing damaged vehicles as well as slicing into [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|enemy]] vehicles for capture or sabotage.<ref name="BFII" />

They would usually engage their targets from close range. Their armament included an [[Shotgun/Legends|shotgun]], [[detonation pack]]s, and a [[F-187 fusioncutter]].<ref name="BFII" /> Because of the versatility of their arsenals they were valuable assets to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] on any battlefield.<ref name="PRIMA" />

==History==
Engineer droids droids were deployed during many battles of the Clone Wars, such as the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Battle of Mygeeto]], the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]], the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] and the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]].<ref name="BFII" />

Following the end of the Clone Wars, they saw [[Battle of Mustafar (Imperial Period)|action]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] with [[Gizor Dellso]]'s [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]].<ref name="BFII" />

==Behind the scenes==
Engineer droids first appeared in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''.<ref name="BFII" /> They replaced the [[OOM pilot battle droid/Legends|droid pilot]] playable in ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''<ref name="BF">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref> as the new CIS engineer class.<ref name="BFII" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
